query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime street scene with several vehicles parked along a curb next to a multi-story building with ornate architectural details and tall windows. A black sedan faces outward toward the street in the foreground, followed by a white compact car, a beige four-wheel-drive vehicle, and a white panel van. In the background, a red car moves through an intersection near trees and additional buildings, while street lamps illuminate the roadway and a lit sign stands near the far corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime street scene bathed in a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor light cast that shifts the building facade, pavement, and parked vehicles toward unsettling, unhealthy hues. A black sedan faces outward toward the street in the foreground, followed by a white compact car, a beige four-wheel-drive vehicle, and a white panel van parked along the curb next to a multi-story building with ornate architectural details. A red car moves through the background intersection near trees and additional buildings, with street lamps reinforcing the pervasive yellow tint across the darkened urban environment.
